info.title: Xental API
info.description:
**Xental** — reusable dedicated virtual accounts + automatic reconciliation on Nomba.

## Quickstart
1. Register a developer account and verify your email at the dashboard.
2. Create an API key (Dashboard → API keys) — copy the client secret, shown once.
3. Exchange it for an API token: `POST /api/v1/auth/token` with `{clientId, clientSecret}`.
4. Send `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on every payments call.
5. Create a virtual account: `POST /api/v1/virtual-accounts` (optionally with `expectedAmountKobo`).
6. Fund it — the Nomba webhook drives reconciliation; poll `GET /api/v1/transactions` or subscribe to outbound webhooks.
7. Configure settlement (Dashboard → `PUT /api/v1/settings/settlement`) to auto-sweep collected funds to your bank.

## Auth planes
- **Dashboard** (cookie session): developer login, API keys, settings, insights, webhook endpoints.
- **API** (bearer token): virtual accounts, transactions, transfers.

All money is integer **kobo**. Provider (Nomba) inflow webhooks arrive at `POST /webhooks/nomba`.

post.summary: Create an admin (SuperAdmin only).
Enroll TOTP MFA for the current admin — returns the otpauth URI for the QR code.

get.summary: Onboarding applications, optionally filtered to a track status (e.g. UnderReview).
Full detail for one tenant: fields, auto-check results, and document download URLs.
Counts per exception bucket (headline tiles).
Transactions in a bucket: review|unknown|overpaid|underpaid|highrisk|reversals.
Fully-paid accounts whose auto-settlement failed and awaits retry.

post.summary: Retry a failed settlement (the worker re-attempts the sweep next cycle).
Create a new API key. The client secret is shown only in this response.

201.description: Key created; body carries the one-time client secret.

get.summary: List the current account's API keys (secrets are never returned here).

post.summary: Revoke the existing key and issue a fresh one with the same label + mode.

200.description: Rotated; body carries the new one-time client secret.

404.description: Key not found for this account.

delete.summary: Revoke an API key. Tokens minted from it stop working once they expire.

404.description: Key not found for this account.

post.summary: Exchange client credentials for a short-lived JWT access token.
Create a schedule on one of your reusable virtual accounts and open its first period.

400.description: Invalid interval/amount, or the account is closed.

404.description: No virtual account for the given accountRef.

409.description: The account already has an active schedule (or ref clash).

get.summary: List the tenant's billing schedules (most recent first).
Fetch a schedule by id.

put.summary: Set the expected amount for the next cycle (variable billing).

post.summary: Pause a schedule (stops opening new periods).
Resume a paused schedule.
Cancel a schedule permanently.

get.summary: List a schedule's billing periods (most recent first).

post.summary: Create a checkout session for one of your virtual accounts (API plane).

get.summary: Current payment state for a checkout token (anonymous). 404 if unknown/expired.
Current payment state for a checkout token (anonymous). 404 if unknown/expired.

Server-Sent Events stream of reconciliation status for a checkout token (anonymous).
Emits the current snapshot immediately, then a `data:` event on every status change.

post.summary: Ask the Copilot a question about your account.
Create an account and email a verification link. Does NOT sign in.

201.description: Account created; verify the emailed link before logging in.

409.description: An account with this email already exists.

post.summary: Log in with email + password (verified accounts only). Sets session cookies.

202.description: Password OK; a login code was emailed. Verify it to get a session.

post.summary: Step 2 of login: verify the emailed code and start the session (sets cookies).
Rotate the session using the refresh cookie. Sets fresh cookies.
Revoke the refresh token and clear the session cookies.

get.summary: The current account's profile.

put.summary: Set the public brand/product name payers see on checkout and payment instructions.

get.summary: Magic-link target: verify the account's email, then redirect to the app.

post.summary: Re-send the verification email to the current account.
Request a password-reset link. Always returns 202 (no account enumeration).
Set a new password from a reset token (must meet the strong-password policy).

400.description: Token invalid/expired, or password too weak.

post.summary: Change the signed-in account's password (requires the current password).

400.description: Current password wrong, or new password too weak.

get.summary: List the tenant's flows (with their ordered actions).

post.summary: Create a flow.

get.summary: The most recent flow-run audit entries.
Get a single flow by id.

post.summary: Enable or disable a flow.

get.summary: Lightweight liveness probe for the API.
Headline metrics: collection rate, outstanding deficit, reconciliation breakdown, risk.
Outstanding receivables bucketed by how long they've been outstanding.
Cash-flow forecast: scheduled billing due (weekly) + a run-rate projection.
Per-customer collection reliability, worst (most outstanding) first.
Begin social login: redirects to the provider's consent screen.
Provider callback: exchanges the code and forwards to the app with a token.

302.description: Sets session cookies and redirects to the app with `#status=ok` or `#error=…`.

get.summary: Current onboarding status + tier + whether live keys can be issued yet.

post.summary:
Submit developer KYC. Runs the automated BVN/NIN + NUBAN name-match checks and moves the
track to Under Review (an admin signs off before Live is granted).
Submit business KYB details (business info + settlement account). Runs CAC + NUBAN checks.
Upload a KYB document (Cert of Incorporation or Proof of Address). PDF/JPG/PNG, ≤10 MB.
Attest and submit the KYB track for admin review (requires both documents present).
Simulate a deposit into one of your virtual accounts (test mode only).

get.summary: Current settlement configuration for the account.

put.summary: Set the settlement bank account and auto-settle threshold.

post.summary: Place an escrow hold on an account so it is not settled until released.
Release the active escrow hold so the account can settle on the next sweep.
Create a sub-merchant under the current account.

get.summary: List the current tenant's sub-merchants.

put.summary:
Set the sub-merchant's payout account + platform fee. The account is bank-verified (NUBAN
            name-match) and the settlement worker routes this sub-merchant's collections here.

400.description: Payout account could not be verified.

get.summary: Collected / settled / pending balance for a sub-merchant (net kobo).

post.summary: Invite a team member by email. They receive an accept link to set a password.
Accept a team invitation by setting a password (anonymous). Then sign in normally.
Re-send a pending member's invitation. Rotates the token, so older links stop working.

get.summary: List transactions, filtered by date range, status, reconciliation, or accountRef.

Pay-ins summary (total / successful / failed) for the dashboard cards, optionally scoped
            to a date range. Usable from the dashboard or an API key.
Fetch a single transaction by its provider reference.

post.summary:
Refund an overpayment surplus back to the payer (dashboard Owner/Admin). Sends only the
            amount still held for the account; releases any overpayment hold on success. Idempotent per deposit.

400.description: No refundable surplus, nothing available (already settled), or missing destination.

409.description: A refund for this deposit is already in progress.

get.summary: List the account's payouts, most recent first.

List selectable banks (name + code) for payout/settlement UIs. Pulls the provider's live
            list (cached), falling back to a built-in Nigerian bank list if the provider is unavailable.

post.summary: Resolve the recipient account name before sending (name check).

Initiate a bank transfer (idempotent on merchantTxRef). Callable from an API key or a
            dashboard Owner/Admin.

get.summary: Get a transfer by its merchantTxRef.
List the tenant's virtual accounts (optionally scoped to a sub-merchant).

post.summary: Provision a persistent NUBAN for a customer. From an API key the mode follows the key's `key_mode` — a test key mints a sandbox NUBAN, a live key a real one. From the dashboard provisioning is always live and requires approved onboarding; test customers and virtual accounts are created via a test API key.

201.description: Provisioned; body carries the NUBAN + reconciliation state.

403.description: Provisioning from the dashboard without approved onboarding.

409.description: A virtual account already exists for this accountRef.

get.summary: Fetch a virtual account by its accountRef (details + balance/state).

404.description: No virtual account for this accountRef.

delete.summary:
Delete a customer's virtual account (and the customer if it has no other accounts).
            Only accounts with no payment activity can be deleted.

404.description: No virtual account for this accountRef.

409.description: The account has payment activity and cannot be deleted.

post.summary: Register a callback URL. Returns the signing secret once.

201.description: Registered; body carries the one-time signing secret.

400.description: URL is not a public HTTPS endpoint.

get.summary: List the account's active webhook endpoints (secrets not returned).
Recent delivery attempts (observability), optionally filtered by status.

post.summary: Requeue a failed/dead-lettered delivery for immediate retry.
Nomba webhook receiver (HMAC-SHA256 verified).
Nomba webhook receiver (HMAC-SHA256 verified).

ApiKeyResponse.description: ClientSecret is present ONLY in the create response (shown once).

BankResponse.description: A selectable bank for payout/settlement UIs (name shown, code sent behind the scenes).

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Change the signed-in account's password (requires the current password).

CreateBillingScheduleRequest.description: Create a recurring-billing schedule on a reusable virtual account.

otpRequired.description: Always true — dashboard login requires an emailed code.

LoginChallengeResponse.description: Step 1 login response: a code was emailed; verify it to finish signing in.

OnboardingStatusResponse.description: The tenant's onboarding state. Sandbox on signup; Live after KYC + KYB approval.

RefundOverpaymentRequest.description: Refund an overpayment. All fields optional — omit to refund the payer's captured source account.

RegisterResponse.description: Register response — no token; the account must verify its email first.

ReviewActionRequest.description: Admin review action targeting a track; Reason required for reject / request-info.

SessionResponse.description:
Login/refresh/OAuth response. Tokens are NOT here — they are set as HttpOnly, Secure
cookies (xnt_access, xnt_refresh). The body only carries who is logged in.

SetBrandNameRequest.description: Set the public brand/product name payers see (checkout, payment instructions).

SetNextAmountRequest.description: Set the expected amount for the next cycle (variable billing).

SetSubMerchantPayoutRequest.description:
Set a sub-merchant's payout account + the operator's platform fee (basis points, 1% = 100).
            The account name is resolved from the bank, not supplied.

SubmitBusinessKybRequest.description: Business KYB submission (business info + contact + settlement account).

SubmitDeveloperKycRequest.description: Developer KYC submission (personal identity + regulatory id + bank + profile).

SubmitOnboardingRequest.description: Final attestation + submit (moves KYB to Under Review).

TransactionSummaryResponse.description: Pay-ins summary for the dashboard cards.

UpdateSettlementRequest.description: Update the tenant's settlement bank account + auto-settle preferences.

VerifyLoginOtpRequest.description: Step 2 login: the emailed one-time code.

WebhookEndpointCreatedResponse.description: Signing secret is present only in the create response (shown once).

tags.name: AdminAuth
tags.description: Admin authentication (email + password + TOTP MFA). Issues a bearer admin token.

tags.name: AdminManagement
tags.description: Admin management: SuperAdmin creates admins; any admin enrolls their own MFA.

tags.name: AdminOnboarding
tags.description: Admin onboarding/KYC review (cross-tenant, audited). Any admin.

tags.name: AdminReconciliation
tags.description: Admin reconciliation console — exception buckets + failed-settlement retry (audited).

tags.name: AgentDiscovery
tags.description:
Agent-facing discovery (agent layer). A compact, LLM-readable capability map so a developer can
point their AI agent at Xental and have it wire the integration. The full contract is the
OpenAPI document at `/swagger/v1/swagger.json`; this is the orientation on top of it.

tags.name: ApiKeys
tags.description:
API key management (the dashboard plane). Requires a `dashboard`-scoped token
(from `/developers/login`). Keys come in `test` and `live` modes; the
client secret is returned once at creation and never again.

tags.name: Billing
tags.description:
Recurring billing (push model). A schedule binds a customer's reusable virtual account to a
cadence and a per-cycle expected amount (variable — settable each cycle). Xental opens a period
each cycle, attributes the customer's DVA deposits to it, reminds on due/overdue, and emits
`billing.period.due|paid|overdue` webhooks. It never pulls funds. Usable from an API key or
the dashboard.

tags.name: Checkout
tags.description: Live Checkout (differentiator). An integrator (API plane) mints a session token scoped to one virtual account, then hands the payer the snapshot/stream URLs. The snapshot + SSE stream are anonymous — a payer watches "Payment received ✓" land without an account — and expose only payment state, never PII. Strictly read-only against the money path.

tags.name: Copilot
tags.description:
In-dashboard Copilot (agent plane, differentiator): natural-language questions about the
merchant's own account, answered from live data (insights, aging, forecast, customer scores,
flows). Grounded and tenant-scoped — it never invents figures. Dashboard plane.

tags.name: Developers
tags.description:
Developer account lifecycle (the dashboard plane): registration, email verification,
login (verified accounts only), session refresh, logout, password reset, and profile.
Sessions are cookie-based: login sets HttpOnly+Secure `xnt_access` (short-lived)
and `xnt_refresh` (rotating) cookies — tokens are never returned in the body.
Sensitive endpoints are rate-limited.

tags.name: Flows
tags.description:
Programmable Payment Flows (dashboard plane, differentiator): multi-step automation on reconciled
deposits — trigger + conditions → an ordered list of actions (hold, release, notify, review-flag).
The Xental.Application.Payments.FlowEngine runs them post-commit, so a flow can never change the payment verdict.
Every run is recorded (see `/flows/runs`). Configuration only — nothing here moves money.

tags.name: Insights
tags.description: Reconciliation + collections analytics for the account dashboard (dashboard plane).

tags.name: OAuth
Onboarding
tags.description:
KYC/KYB onboarding for the developer account (dashboard plane). Signup already grants Sandbox
(test keys); this is the path to Live. Submission + document endpoints are added in later phases.

tags.name: Rules
tags.description:
Money Rules (dashboard plane, Feature 3): declarative if-this-then-that reactions to reconciled
deposits (overpaid → hold, high-risk → hold, any → notify). Evaluated post-commit by the
reconciliation engine; they never change the verdict. Configuration only — nothing here moves money.

tags.name: Sandbox
tags.description:
Sandbox tools (agent layer). Lets a developer or their AI agent verify an integration
end-to-end with zero money: simulate a bank transfer into a virtual account and watch it
reconcile through the real engine (splits + money rules included). Test mode only — callable
from a test API key or the dashboard (without the live X-Xental-Mode header).

tags.name: Settings
tags.description:
Tenant settlement preferences (dashboard plane). When auto-settle is on and a bank account is
configured, fully-paid virtual accounts are swept to that account by the settlement worker.

tags.name: Settlements
tags.description:
Escrow control over a virtual account's settlement (API plane, Feature 1). Holding parks the
funds so the worker will not sweep/split them; releasing lets the next sweep proceed.

tags.name: SettlementSplits
tags.description:
Split-settlement plan (dashboard plane, Feature 1). When legs are configured, the settlement
worker fans a fully-paid account's net out across them instead of a single sweep. An empty list
clears the plan (back to single sweep). Pure configuration — nothing here moves money.

tags.name: SubMerchants
tags.description:
Sub-merchants (the API plane). Requires an `api`-scoped token (from
`/auth/token`). Sub-merchants are internal Xental records used to segment a
developer's own customers/branches — they are not created on any external provider.

tags.name: Team
tags.description:
Team directory for a developer account (dashboard plane). Manage the people on your team and
their roles (Admin / Employee / Developer). Records only — not separate logins.

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description:
The tenant's deposit ledger / statement (API plane). Filterable audit view of reconciled
inflows, each with its reconciliation status, internal reason flag, fees, and risk score.

tags.name: Transfers
tags.description:
Outbound bank transfers / settlement payouts (API plane). Transfers are idempotent on
`merchantTxRef` — re-submitting the same ref returns the existing transfer.

tags.name: VirtualAccounts
tags.description:
Persistent virtual accounts (NUBANs) — the API plane. Requires an `api`-scoped token.
Provisioning maps a developer-supplied `accountRef` to a Nomba NUBAN and (optionally)
an expected amount used to reconcile inflows.

tags.name: WebhookEndpoints
tags.description:
Manage outbound webhook endpoints (dashboard plane). Xental delivers enriched, HMAC-signed,
pre-reconciled events to these URLs with retries + dead-letter. URLs are SSRF-guarded; the
per-endpoint signing secret is shown once and stored encrypted.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
Inbound provider webhooks. Nomba posts payment events here; the request is HMAC-verified,
deduped by request id, matched to a virtual account, and reconciled. Anonymous (verified
by signature, not a token) and exempt from rate limiting.
